title: Minecraft HD(64x) Fresh Animations Add-On
description: This add-on makes Fresh Animations compatible with the Minecraft HD(64x) resource pack.
body:
This add-on makes [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) compatible with the [Minecraft HD(64x)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-hd(64x)-fan-updated-by-mrdhobbs) resource pack.

Fresh Animations gives an animation overhaul to creatures, with an aim to make the mobs more dynamic and believable.

Requires Optifine, or Fabric with Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features mods (preferred).
